name: business-plan-executive-summary
description: Write a concise, investor-ready 1-page executive summary that captures the essence of a business plan and compels further reading.
input_description: Business name, industry, problem solved, solution, target market and size, business model, competitive advantage, traction or milestones, team, financial highlights, and funding ask.
output_description: One-page executive summary in Markdown (600-800 words) covering: Business Overview, Problem & Solution, Market Opportunity, Business Model, Traction, Team, Financials Snapshot, and The Ask.
